name: android-tv-debloat-toolkit
description: Lightweight toolkit to debloat, install APKs, and customize Android TV devices.
readme_summary: This Python-based Windows application simplifies the customization of Android TV devices. It allows users to connect via Wi-Fi, debloat unnecessary apps, install custom launchers and APKs, and disable the default Google TV launcher, leading to a cleaner and faster user experience.
key_features: Connect to Android TV over Wi-Fi (ADB Wireless)
primary_use_case: To debloat, customize, and improve the performance of Android TV devices by removing unwanted applications and system services.
cover_image_prompt: A digital gardener carefully pruning overgrown, tangled vines (representing bloatware) from a sleek, modern Android TV set. The gardener uses glowing digital shears, and as vines are cut, the TV screen brightens and displays a clean, minimalist interface. Small icons representing installed APKs and a custom launcher float gently around the TV. The background is a clean, minimalist room with subtle circuit board patterns. The overall mood is one of digital decluttering and optimization. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with bright, clean lighting and a focus on the transformation from cluttered to streamlined.

name: RuView
description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
readme_summary: RuView is a Rust-based WiFi sensing platform that uses ESP32 sensors to capture and interpret Channel State Information (CSI) from WiFi signals. It enables real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring (breathing and heart rate), activity recognition, and environmental mapping without requiring cameras or wearables. The system operates entirely on edge hardware, learning environments locally and ensuring privacy.
key_features: Real-time human pose estimation (17 COCO keypoints)
Contactless vital sign monitoring (breathing and heart rate)
Local environment learning with spiking neural networks
primary_use_case: To transform commodity WiFi signals into a comprehensive sensing system for real-time human activity and vital sign monitoring, operating entirely on edge devices without cameras.
cover_image_prompt: A conceptual illustration of a person's silhouette being revealed not by light, but by intricate, glowing WiFi signal patterns weaving through a solid wall. The WiFi signals, depicted as ethereal blue and green energy tendrils, precisely outline the person's pose and even subtle movements like breathing. In the foreground, a small, minimalist ESP32 device emits these signals. Subtle data visualizations, like heart rate graphs and keypoint outlines, float around the silhouette, indicating the output. The scene is set in a dimly lit, abstract room, emphasizing the 'seeing through walls' aspect. The style is a blend of futuristic digital art and ethereal visualization, with a focus on clean lines and glowing energy.

name: sbv
description: Web viewer for SMS Backup & Restore XML files
readme_summary: SBV (SMS Backup Viewer) is a modern web application designed to view SMS and MMS message backups from XML files generated by the 'SMS Backup & Restore' app. It provides a user-friendly, texting app-like interface for browsing, searching, and filtering messages, including support for media attachments and call logs.
key_features: Web application for viewing SMS/MMS backups
SMS, MMS, and call logs support
primary_use_case: To provide a web-based interface for easily viewing, searching, and managing SMS, MMS, and call log backups created by the 'SMS Backup & Restore' Android application.
cover_image_prompt: A digital archivist carefully organizing and illuminating ancient scrolls that represent SMS and MMS messages. The archivist is using a magnifying glass that reveals vibrant, modern chat bubbles and media previews within the scrolls. In the background, a subtle, glowing interface shows search bars and filter options. The scene is set in a clean, organized digital library with soft, ambient lighting. Small data particles flow from the scrolls to a central database icon. The image should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, emphasizing clarity and accessibility.

name: maivi
description: Maivi - My AI Voice Input: Real-time voice-to-text local on cpu better than whisper with hotkey support
readme_summary: Maivi is a cross-platform desktop application that provides real-time, local voice-to-text transcription using advanced AI models. It features hotkey support for easy recording, automatic clipboard copying, and a floating overlay for live transcription, designed to be efficient and accurate even on CPU.
primary_use_case: To provide users with a fast, accurate, and convenient way to convert spoken words into text in real-time, directly on their local machine, with seamless integration into their workflow.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot assistant with a microphone icon on its chest, actively listening. Sound waves are visibly flowing from the robot's 'ears' into a sleek, transparent overlay window floating beside it, where clear, readable text is appearing in real-time. Subtle digital particles and lines of code emanate from the overlay, indicating the AI processing. The background is a clean, minimalist desktop environment, emphasizing the application's unobtrusive nature. The overall mood is helpful and efficient, with soft, ambient lighting. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a focus on clear visual communication of the voice-to-text conversion process.
